case_title: MARTIN WINDERL VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DAVID NOSENZO, VICE PRESIDENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT CAZADORO CONSTRUCTION INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,016.00 FILED BY WINDERL, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO CAZADORO CONSTRUCTION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINDERL, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-12-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAZADORO CONSTRUCTION INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) REMY WEILAND, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINDERL, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT CAZADORO CONSTRUCTION INC.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-26-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARTIN WINDERL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY REMY WEILAND, CLAIM ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT CAZADORO CONSTRUCTION INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAVID NOSENZO (VICE PRESIDENT). BOTH DEFENDANTS CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND CAZADORO CONSTRUCTION INC. WAIVE SERVICES. COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1,080.00 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CHECK BY OCT-21, 2022. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE OCT-26, 2022, 3:30 P.M. HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
